suite.name: Enrolls

test.name: Deve matricular um aluno

kw.name: Load Json From File
kw.doc: Load JSON from file.

kw.name: Load Json From File
kw.doc: Load JSON from file.

kw.name: Connect To Database
kw.doc: Loads the DB API 2.0 module given `dbapiModuleName` then uses it to connect to the database using `dbName`, `dbUsername`, and `dbPassword`.
kw.msg: Connecting using : psycopg2.connect(database=ugwbldbd, user=ugwbldbd, password=ziFOixraKug5cy8idQLXSqHhGSM2kGjj, host=tuffi.db.elephantsql.com, port=5432)

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Execute Sql String
kw.doc: Executes the sqlString as SQL commands. Useful to pass arguments to your sql. Set optional input `sansTran` to True to run command without an explicit transaction commit or rollback.
kw.msg: Executing : Execute SQL String | DELETE FROM public.students WHERE email = 'falcao@yahoo.com';

kw.name: Disconnect From Database
kw.doc: Disconnects from the database.

kw.name: POST
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3333/sessions path_url=/sessions headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.28.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '72', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"name": "Admin", "email": "admin@smartbit.com", "password": "qacademy"}'

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3333/students path_url=/students headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.28.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6MSwiaWF0IjoxNjgwMDUzNzg0LCJleHAiOjE2ODA2NTg1ODR9.LegNDSTTt_tJ0iRAY5mij1Xj5nUj5Twh4ZuItCqKgYA', 'Content-Length': '106', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"feet_tall": 1.78, "weight": 80, "age": 22, "name": "Falc\\u00e3o do Santos", "email": "falcao@yahoo.com"}'

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.doc: Open a new Page.
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:3000
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text 'admin@smartbit.com' in the given field.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text 'qacademy' in the given field.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=aside strong at state visible

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Falcão do Santos' in the given field.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Focus
kw.doc: Moves focus on to the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Keyboard Key
kw.doc: Press a keyboard key on the virtual keyboard or set a key up or down.

kw.name: Keyboard Key
kw.doc: Press a keyboard key on the virtual keyboard or set a key up or down.

kw.doc: Press a keyboard key on the virtual keyboard or set a key up or down.

kw.doc: Press a keyboard key on the virtual keyboard or set a key up or down.

kw.doc: Press a keyboard key on the virtual keyboard or set a key up or down.

kw.doc: Press a keyboard key on the virtual keyboard or set a key up or down.

kw.name: Keyboard Key
kw.doc: Press a keyboard key on the virtual keyboard or set a key up or down.

kw.name: Keyboard Key
kw.doc: Press a keyboard key on the virtual keyboard or set a key up or down.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: TimeoutError: locator.click: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. =========================== logs =========================== waiting for locator('button').locator('text=Salvar') ============================================================ Tip: Use "Set Browser Timeout" for increasing the timeout or double check your locator as the targeted element(s) couldn't be found.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.status: TimeoutError: locator.click: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. =========================== logs =========================== waiting for locator('button').locator('text=Salvar') ============================================================ Tip: Use "Set Browser Timeout" for increasing the timeout or double check your locator as the targeted element(s) couldn't be found.

suite.doc: Suite de teste de matriculas de alunos Administrador uma vez logado consegue matricular alunos na academia
